title: Elytra texture without cape(Purple Heart)
description: In this project, I will provide you with resource packs that have the textures of capes (without the need to have a cape) and if any new capes are added to the Minecraft
body:
![This resource pack changes the texture of the Elytra to look like a cloak, but without the player actually having the cloak on. That is, it only shows the cloaked appearance of the Elytra, even when the player is not wearing the cloak.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/389e8fa6ee891233ed86a5077c3727d98aa57bb0.jpeg)Some people, including myself, may not be able to use the cloak in-game for whatever reason, so I came up with the idea of ​​making the Elytra texture change without the need for the cloak....Using this resource pack, you can use the texture of this cloak for your Elytra....In the not too distant future I will be making Elytro textures from other capes as well, and if a new cape is released one day I will make a texture for it as soon as possible.A simple resourcepack that retextures the Elytra to look like a cape — even if you're not wearing one! Perfect for players who want that cape look without actually equipping a cape.
✨ No OptiFine required, works on vanilla
